title: Load Breaking
description: Changes the breaking animation into a loading bar.
body: A simple but elegant resource pack that replaces the default cracking animation when breaking blockx with a smooth loading bar. It's suble but different and makes telling how far along you are when breaking a block easier to understand. ![ezgif-25537bf01a863b](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/43559bc1-2395-44dc-bf25-d0dc94f42685)
